cases.description: Line chart of order amounts over time from evals_orders

cases.description: Pie chart breaking down orders by product category
cases.input: Show me a pie chart of total order amounts broken down by product_category from {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders

cases.description: Polar area chart of order amounts by product category
cases.input: Create a polar area chart showing order amounts by product_category from {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders

cases.description: Radar chart comparing salary across departments in evals_employees
cases.input: Draw a spider chart comparing average salary across departments from {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_employees

cases.description: Time-series data should use line chart, not radar
cases.input: Plot order amounts over time from {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders

cases.description: Proportion/share breakdown should use pie chart over polar
cases.input: Show the share of total revenue by product_category from {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders as a chart

cases.description: Chart request with no table or data provided — agent must ask for clarification
